required_elements.title: Security Responsibility Designation
required_elements.question_text: The facility has a designated individual responsible for security.

required_elements.title: Security Roles Defined
required_elements.question_text: The facility has defined security roles for key positions.

required_elements.title: Written Security Policy
required_elements.question_text: The facility has a written security policy or equivalent statement.

required_elements.title: Medical Equipment Security
required_elements.question_text: The facility has security measures in place for critical medical equipment.
